label: professional_details
value: Interested in tools and technologies to assist in managing IV therapy more effectively, including smart infusion pumps, wireless IV management systems, improved central and peripheral venous catheter technologies, pain management tools, mobile applications, patient education tools, remote monitoring devices, needle-free connection systems, intelligent skin monitoring patches, and standardized workflows and checklists.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Considering strategies for managing rotating shifts, including using calendars for scheduling, prioritizing tasks, communicating with supervisor, ensuring adequate sleep, packing healthy meals, staying hydrated, using mindfulness apps like Headspace, Calm, Insight Timer, practicing quick stress-relief techniques, connecting with peer support, engaging with community groups, applying nursing skills in volunteer work, leading educational workshops, attending networking events, collaborating with other organizations, and regularly evaluating balance between commitments. Additional strategies include gradual shift changes, light exposure management, consistent sleep routine, diet and hydration, physical activity, mindfulness and relaxation techniques, sleep environment optimization, limiting caffeine and stimulants, and consulting a sleep specialist if needed.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Interested in plant-based snacks that are high in protein to ensure adequate protein intake without relying heavily on meat.

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Expanding reading interests to include historical fiction novels after enjoying some recommended by a colleague. Previously read mostly non-fiction and biographies. Interested in staying updated with new books.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in measuring the long-term impact of healthcare outreach programs, including methods such as pre- and post-assessments, tracking health indicators, participant feedback, healthcare utilization, community health metrics, longitudinal studies, partnerships and collaboration, technology and digital tools, community engagement, and reporting and dissemination.

label: important_personal_details
value: Volunteering with a local healthcare outreach program providing free health screenings and educational workshops.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Signed up for an online course on advanced nursing practices and seeking tips to balance studying and work without burning out.
